description: Firewall test VM C — webserver in testPinhole zone (used by firewall/test.sh --deep). Provider for the auto-pinhole (#173) live test: consumer test-fw-a in testAllowA depends on test-fw-c:web, which triggers a cross-zone pinhole into testPinhole because testAllowA is in testPinhole.pinhole-allowed-from but NOT in testPinhole.access-to.
